samples.xml_description:
<module id="adder_32bit">
    <description>Implement a 32-bit carry-lookahead adder using the Carry-Lookahead Adder (CLA) architecture.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="A" width_description="[32:1]">32-bit input operand A.</input>
        <input id="B" width_description="[32:1]">32-bit input operand B.</input>
        <output id="S" width_description="[32:1]">32-bit output representing the sum of A and B.</output>
        <output id="C32">Carry-out output.</output>
    </ports>
    <implementation>Divide the 32-bit adder into two 16-bit blocks for parallel processing. Each block computes partial sums and carries using the CLA structure. The final outputs combine the results of both blocks to produce the overall sum and carry-out.</implementation>
</module>
